name: Crisp Pasta Pancake with Spicy Pepper Relish
recipeInstructions:
1. Stem and seed the peppers and chilies; slice into thin strips.
2. In a large bowl, mix together the sliced peppers, chilies, sugar, and vinegar.
3. Transfer the mixture to a nonstick frying pan.
4. Cook and stir over medium heat until most of the liquid has evaporated, about 30 minutes.
5. Meanwhile, cook the pasta according to package directions.
6. Drain the pasta completely, then transfer to a bowl and toss with sesame oil to coat.
7. Heat a 12-inch pizza pan in a 500°F oven until hot, about 5 minutes.
8. Without turning off the oven, remove the pizza pan.
9. Coat the pan evenly with salad oil, then spread the pasta in the pan.
10. Return the pan to the oven and bake the pasta on the lowest rack until golden brown (about 20 minutes).
11. Slide the pancake out onto a serving platter.
12. Top with the pepper mixture and cut into wedges.
